---
title: "scDiffCom Post-Analysis (H&N)"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
---

This notebook runs cross-cohort scDiffCom post-analysis for Head & Neck datasets.
See [README.md](README.md) for section descriptions and how to add cohorts.

```{r setup-post-analysis, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  message = TRUE,
  warning = TRUE,
  fig.width = 10,
  fig.height = 7
)

# Resolve paths relative to this file (post_analysis/)
POST_ANALYSIS_DIR <- normalizePath(".", winslash = "/")
PROJECT_SCRIPTS   <- normalizePath(file.path(POST_ANALYSIS_DIR, "..", ".."), winslash = "/")

source(file.path(PROJECT_SCRIPTS, "utils/Utils.R"))
source(file.path(POST_ANALYSIS_DIR, "R/00_setup.R"))
source(file.path(POST_ANALYSIS_DIR, "R/01_load_filter.R"))
source(file.path(POST_ANALYSIS_DIR, "config/hnsc_datasets.R"))
source(file.path(POST_ANALYSIS_DIR, "R/02_cci_helpers.R"))
source(file.path(POST_ANALYSIS_DIR, "R/03_lri_helpers.R"))

if (!requireNamespace("ggrepel", quietly = TRUE)) {
  message("ggrepel not installed — some UMAP labels will be skipped.")
} else {
  library(ggrepel)
}
if (!requireNamespace("batchelor", quietly = TRUE)) {
  message("batchelor not installed — MNN UMAP sections may fail.")
} else {
  library(batchelor)
}
```

```{r child = "sections/01_load_and_filter.Rmd"}
```

```{r child = "sections/02_qc_celltypes.Rmd"}
```

```{r child = "sections/03_build_cci_sets.Rmd"}
```

```{r child = "sections/04_goi_cross_cohort.Rmd"}
```

```{r child = "sections/05_global_jaccard_umap.Rmd"}
```

```{r child = "sections/06_gene_gene_jaccard.Rmd"}
```

```{r child = "sections/07_lri_per_dataset.Rmd"}
```

```{r child = "sections/08_lri_cross_cohort_umap.Rmd"}
```

```{r child = "sections/09_hvg_ccis.Rmd"}
```

```{r child = "sections/10_limma_batch.Rmd"}
```
